options.name: --all
options.description:
Typically we show one provider information at a time. This
will show all of them without pause.

options.name: --caps
options.description:
Instead of highlighting text, will show it in all caps with
a '***' indicator at the start of a line.

options.name: --github-api-token
options.description:
A GitHub Personal Access Token. If you generate one and
pass it, you won't hit the smaller rate-limits of un-authenticated
accounts.

arguments.name: tffilespath
arguments.description:
Path where your Terraform is located. Defaults to current 
directory.
